biological_inference: danio_albolineatus has no strict markers at depth 10; 29 female-biased high-posterior marker(s) form an exploratory female-heterogametic validation set, but the source call remains strict-null. 158 Bayes-factor-only row(s) are held out of the sex-system call. Singleton fraction is 20.0%.

tinca_tinca has 6 male-biased strict markers at depth 10, supporting a male-heterogametic XX/XY interpretation on the RAD marker table. Posterior triage adds 5 validation target(s). 432 Bayes-factor-only row(s) remain below the posterior call threshold. Singleton fraction is 7.7%.
